cooperates.cooperate_desc: Cyclops ult can lock down enemies in which gloo can utilize and lock down enemies for easier kills. Plus, cyclops insane damage and low cooldown synergize perfectly with gloo.

counters.counter_desc: Faramis second skill can deal insane amount of damage to gloo when in his split form. As much as possible when you're matched with him, avoid using your split form frequently. Only use it to lock down enemies and immediately use your ult to avoid faramis's second skill

dominants.dominant_desc: Since gloo kinda flop in the exp lane, you can use him on the mid lane. This approach is very useful since gloo is a monster in the early game. If your jungler is an aggresive invader, you can help them steal the enemies buff for secured snowball. Also, you can help in literally every turtle, lord, and even team fights with this mid gloo strategy.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: In general, Gloo is compatible with a lot of heroes but he needs to be paired with a hero that can push. As a simple, sample opening pick, Karrie works well with Gloo. It also denies your opponent to use Karrie against Gloo, which Gloo does not do well since Karrie's passive hurts him a lot.

counters.counter_desc: Faramis is a hard counter as his second skill obliterates Gloo's mini-Gloos
Same with Faramis, Vexana's passive destroys or cripples Gloo's mini-Gloos

dominants.dominant_desc:
From Level 1 to 4, during the laning phase, your first skill is your core to deal damage. Try to apply the full passive stacks of Gloo to your opponent so they deal less damage and become extremely slow.

Release your first skill and move up to it to reset cooldown, this is generally what you want to do early on.

From Level 5 to 10, after clearing your lane, gank other lanes to pressure your opponents. Make sure after ganking, push and deal damage to turret, or completely destroy it. 

By this stage, majority of the map is yours.
dominants.dominant_title: Mid Game - Choosing between Ganking and Lane Pressure

dominants.dominant_desc:
From Level 11 to 15, once you're comfortable with your items, it will be your job to break your opponents' formation.

Since this is a simple guide, see as follows

1. Always catch the vulnerable damage dealer (MM, assassin, mage). Bring this TO your team.


2. If you can't reach the damage dealer, catch the playmaker or heroes that threaten you with control abilities (Tank, Supports). Bring this AWAY from your team. **By bringing the caught hero to your opponent or away from your team, they are forced to choose to retreat, attack you (which cripples the caught hero), or force a teamfight, which overloads your opponents on decision making.
dominants.dominant_title: Late Game - Breaking Opponent lines: MM or Tank?

emblems.emblem_desc:
Common Emblem will give Gloo that slight HP regen for Laning as well as Mana Regen so you don't run out of mana spamming your first skill.

Agility, for that slight MS boost

Wilderness Blessing, for that extra MS Boost during chases in the jungle or river

Brave Smite, for that extra heal so you can trade hits with your opponent better

equips.equip_desc:
This will how your endgame equipment look like. 

For this guide, Glowing Wand and Oracle are your core items, while the rest, you can adapt depending on your opponents.

By midgame, you should have at least Glowing Wand and Oracle. These will be your core items.

Glowing Wand gives everything for Gloo: magic power for that small boost of damage, HP based damage over time via the burn effect, Movement speed, and small boost in HP. It even has the anti-heal capabilities which directly counters those with high sustain and helps him trade hits.

Oracle is for that boost in heal as well as giving him hybrid defense; a straightforward item.

hero.hero_overview: This guide focuses on Gloo's ability to control and break opponents' lines as an Exp laner.
hero.hero_strength:
-Gloo's passive at maximum stacks gives damage reduction and reduced movement speed, making him much more defensive

-Gloo's Ultimate is extremely frustrating to deal with due to the fact that it is a soft lockdown since opponents are forced to run back and their teammates being unable to deal damage to him for risk of hurting their caught teammate.
hero.hero_weakness:
-Mobile heroes will be a problem for Gloo; either you can't catch them OR you catch them and they bring you to an unsafe location

-If you miss touching the goo of his first skill to reset, you can be punished by opponents

data.recommend: A simple, straightforward guide to Exp Gloo

spell.spell_desc: For this guide, Flicker will be your choice for battle spell. It helps you reposition defensively or aggresively, since Gloo has a low movement speed.

data.title: A Beginner's Guide to Exp Gloo

data.title: Begginer guide

hero.hero_overview:
Mysterious creatures that merge together.

A faction that lives deep among the trees of the Shadow Swamp. Gloo can amalgamate together to grow in size, and can also wreak havoc by latching on to other organisms, too.
hero.hero_strength: Gloo's strength and incredible endurance is an incredibly durable, disruptive tank with high sustain (healing), excellent zoning, and the ability to shut down key enemy backliners by attaching to them with his Ultimate, transferring damage and controlling their movement
hero.hero_weakness: Gloo's weaknesses is getting involve heroes with high burst damage (like Faramis, Vexana), strong healing reduction (Dominance Ice), or anti-CC/mobility to escape his sticky skills, especially when he's split or trying to ult, with heroes like Wanwan, Lancelot, Yu Zhong being tough matchups for him. Items that slow or cleanse and heroes that can disable his ult (Winter Crown) or just avoid his initial skill sets are key counters.

hero.hero_overview:
غلوو بشكل عام ينفع لطريقين وهما طريق الخبرة وطريق التجوال والافضل أن يكون تجهيز المعركة (المميزات ) (وميض )مع مراعاة المعدات والافضل فيها يكون في طريق الخبرة  وفي الطريقين يجب بعد أن تنتهي اول الخمس الدقائق أن تقاتل مع فريقك وتحاول السيطرة على الأعداء والاندماج بأحد فيهم حتى تكون جميع الهجمات من الأعداء موجهة اليك وإذا كنت قد أتممت الاندماج ستكون بطريقة غير مباشرة موجهة أيضا إلي العدو الذي تستعمل الالت عليه

وايضا اذا وجدت رامي العدو بمفرده وهو وحدك ايضا تستطيع أن تعمل الحركة الاولى عليه ثم وميض بعدها مباشرة ثم الحركة الاولى ثم الثانية ثم تستعمل الالت وهكذا سيموت الرامي طبعا اذا كنت محارب فلا تنفع هذه الطريقة اذا كنت مدرع لأنها لن تكون معدات مناسبة
hero.hero_strength:
تتمثل قوة غلوو بهيله العالي الذي يسمح له بوضع اثاره  على الأعداء قبل أن يموت بحيث يستطيع الاندماج بهم ويزيد الهيل الخاص به  وعندما يندمج بهم يستطيع تحريكهم إلي تجمع الفريق أو إلى البرج الحليف وايضا بالرغم من هيله العالي إلى أن دمجه قوي


وايضا من نقاط قوة غلو في التجمعات مع الأعداء  حيث اذا اندمح في واحد من الأعداء واقترب منهم أثناء قتالات الفريقين ستذهب معظم الهجمات من الاعداء نحوه مما يتسبب من ناحية في مقتل بطل العدو الذي تم استعمال الالت عليه ومن ناحية أخرى يمنح وقت للفريق الحليف في شن هجماتهم على الاعداء



وايضا هناك ميزة في الحركة الثانية حيث اذا عملها ودخل البرج لن يصاب هو بضرر حتى فترة انتهائها
hero.hero_weakness:
نقاط ضعف البطل غلو تتمثل في


1 أن يشتري العدو معدة التجميد حيث عند عمل الالت على بطل العدو ومن ثم يفعل العدو التجميد سيذهب الالت بدون فائدة


2 اذا كان أعداءه هم الابطال الذي يكون الالت الخاص بهم هو اختفائهم حيث اذا فعل غلو  الالت الخاص به عليهم ثم هم أيضا عملوا الالت سيذهب الت غلو بلا فائدة وأمثلة على إبطال الأعداء : لونكس ....


3 يوزونغ أيضا عندما يتحول الى تنين يجعل الت غلو بلا فائدة


4الحركة الثانية لغلو هي ضعف كبير له فإذا كان الشخصم لديه سرقة حياة  عالية فسياخذ سرقة حياة بمقدار عدد الانقسامات التي في غلو والتي استطاع إصابتها مما يتسبب في زيادة هيله بدرجة عالية وأمثلة على الابطال : دايروث ، يوزونغ....


4ان يكون ضده الابطال الحركات لديهم يكون لها الدمج أعلى على حسب عدد الأعداء حيث اذا فعل غلو الحركة الثانية وكان على سبيل المثال ضده فيكسانا فعندما تضرب يتوزع الضرر على كل الانقسامات مما يتسبب في ضرر عالي 



5 أن يكون الخصم رامي بعيد المدى حيث لا يستطيع الوصول له وعمل اي شيئ له

data.recommend: جميع مزايا ونقاط ضعف البطل غلو وكيفية استعمالها بكفاءة عالية

وايضا عندما تقتل العدو باستعمال الالت سيكون الأعداء متجمعين عليك وهناك وقت انتظار 4 ثواني حتى يشتغل الالت مرة أخرى فتستطيع توفير الوقت اللازم

data.title: Best tanky exp adjust

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Synergy Spotlight - Why Gloo Works So Well with Xavier

Gloo pairs extremely well with Xavier, creating a combo that locks down enemies and makes it easier for Xavier to land his high-damage skill shots. Gloo's skills slow, immobilize, and stick to enemies, holding them in place just long enough for Xavier to charge and snipe with his Skill 1 and Ultimate. What's more, when Xavier casts skills, he creates Mystic Field, which grants bonus movement speed to allies who pass through it - including Gloo.

This movement speed boost lets Gloo engage faster, reposition while using Split-Split, or even chase down escaping enemies. In return, Gloo gives Xavier space and crowd control, preventing assassins or fighters from diving him during teamfights. Together, they form a powerful zone-control duo - Gloo slows and sticks, Xavier snipes and finishes.

Synergy Spotlight - Gloo x Zhuxin: Sustain & Pressure Combo

Gloo and Zhuxin make a powerful frontline-backline combo that excels in sustained teamfights. Gloo's role is to dive, disrupt, and stick to enemies, forcing them to deal with his annoying presence while taking shared damage. At the same time, Zhuxin can safely deal massive DPS from behind, thanks to her long-range and lifesteal-heavy kit.

The real synergy happens when Gloo activates Split-Split and attaches to an enemy — dragging them around and making it easier for Zhuxin to land her skills. Meanwhile, Gloo's slows and immobilize from Skill 1 & 2 allow Zhuxin to fully charge her petals for maximum poke and burst. Since both heroes are strong in extended fights, Zhuxin can sustain off Gloo's lockdown, and Gloo gets value from a safe, consistent damage dealer backing him up.

Together, they're a nightmare duo - Gloo tanks, annoys, and zones, while Zhuxin melts whoever gets caught.

counters.counter_desc:
Gloo Counters Hanzo - Here's Why

Gloo is one of the best counters to Hanzo, especially when Hanzo uses his Ultimate (Kinjutsu: Pinnacle Ninja) to enter ghost form. When Gloo uses Split-Split and attaches to the ghost, the link doesn't break even after Hanzo returns to his body - Gloo sticks to the real Hanzo's location. This means Gloo can track Hanzo's true body, chase him down, or even drag him out of hiding for an easy kill. Most heroes can't punish Hanzo during ult, but Gloo completely exposes him.

dominants.dominant_desc:
In the early game, Gloo shines by using his Skill 1 (Slam, Slam) and passive (Stick, Stick) to poke enemies and control the EXP lane. Use Skill 1 to throw out consistent poke while applying slow and damage reduction from your passive - this makes it hard for enemies to trade back effectively. Always stay aggressive in lane, using the brush to pressure and harass. Your main goal before minute 2 is to reach level 4 as fast as possible, unlocking your ultimate and becoming a serious threat.

Once you hit level 4, rotate quickly to the jungle area or Turtle lane. Use Gloo's early power spike to zone out the enemy jungler, especially during the first Turtle spawn. With your ultimate ready and your slow stacking combo, you can disrupt their rotation, force Retribution mistakes, or even bait them into bad fights. Securing early objectives while denying the enemy jungle tempo is what turns Gloo from just a tank into a game-controlling menace.
dominants.dominant_title: Battle Strategy - Early Lane Domination & Objective Control

emblems.emblem_desc:
Talent Build Explanation

For Gloo, this talent setup boosts his mobility and teamfight utility. Agility increases movement speed, helping Gloo rotate faster, chase down enemies after using Skill 2, or escape tricky situations. Wilderness Blessing further enhances movement speed in the river and bush, which synergizes well with Gloo's roaming and ambush potential — especially when setting up teamfights in narrow jungle paths. Finally, Focusing Mark gives a huge edge in team coordination by increasing the damage your allies deal to enemies you've hit with skills. Since Gloo doesn't deal much burst damage himself, this makes him even more valuable by helping teammates burst targets faster during your ultimate or immobilizing combos.

equips.equip_desc: While most players build Gloo full tank, going off-meta with Ice Queen Wand can secretly unlock his full potential. This item provides Magic Power, HP, Mana Regen, and most importantly, its unique slow effect perfectly stacks with Gloo's skill combo. Every time Gloo hits enemies with his split bodies or skills, the slow keeps enemies stuck longer, making it even harder for them to escape during his ultimate. The bonus movement speed also helps Gloo reposition faster, chase, or drag enemies more effectively when paired with Flameshot. Plus, the added HP and Magic Power gives him just enough survivability and extra damage to stay relevant in fights. It's a bold pick, but if used right, it turns Gloo into a slippery menace with surprising utility and control.

hero.hero_overview:
Gloo - The Swamp Spirit

Gloo is a durable tank with unique mechanics that make him a nightmare in extended fights. With high sustain, area control, and one of the most annoying ultimates in the game, Gloo thrives in chaos.

He splits into mini-Gloos, slows enemies, and can even attach himself to opponents during his Ultimate, forcing them to take shared damage while he heals like crazy.
hero.hero_strength: Gloo excels as a disruptive tank with incredible sustain and crowd control, making him a nightmare in extended teamfights. His unique ultimate allows him to attach to enemies, forcing them to take shared damage while he regenerates HP, making him very hard to kill. With skills that slow, immobilize, and zone out enemies, Gloo dominates narrow areas and frontline engagements, thriving in chaotic battles where his presence alone can turn the tide.
hero.hero_weakness: Gloo's main weakness lies in his lack of burst damage, making him heavily reliant on teammates to finish off enemies. He's also vulnerable to heroes with Purify, high mobility, or sustained DPS, which can counter his ultimate and wear him down quickly. Without proper coordination, his crowd control and zoning tools lose impact, and if he misses his skill combos, his threat level drops significantly. Additionally, Gloo struggles when behind in gold or items, turning him into more of a meat shield than a true playmaker.

data.recommend: Gloo God: Why You Should Try This Gloo Guide

spell.spell_desc:
Battle Spell: Flameshot

While most tank players stick with Flicker or Vengeance, Flameshot is a highly underrated but powerful choice for Gloo especially when paired with his ultimate. When Gloo attaches to an enemy using Split, Split, you can aim Flameshot to push yourself (and the attached enemy) in a specific direction. This lets you drag enemies out of position, pull them into your team, or even knock them under turret pressure. It's a sneaky, high-impact tool that turns Gloo into a playmaker, giving you control over enemy positioning in ways they won't expect. Plus, the extra poke and knockback gives you added utility in lane and during chases.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Best team to have is ammon for it has a burst effect and could easily take down enemy heroes, this will help gloo to recover its ultimate to an enemy hero being taken down
A burst mage could also help gloo in team fights and could help him take down enemies by Vexana's skills
A super duper perfect hero to be matched with especially of gloo utilizing its ult to an enemy hero escaping and using Brody's ultimate on finishing.

counters.counter_desc: This hero if you use your ultimate to another hero and yin uses its ultimate, you will be dragged to Yin's domain where you will be off the enemy. But the thing is you can still survive especially you're a tanky hero not a damage one
It's a very huge disadvantage for gloo is when Lunox is using it's ultimate while you're on it. It will be a waste of your ultimate because you'll be dropped off from it

dominants.dominant_desc: First of all, always make zone for the team jungler. Upon doing this you can invade enemy jungler by spamming your first skill and also by requesting a teammate to support you. Take note you're a roaming gloo, and not a damage. By this it gives advantage to your team to level up fast

Here's a tip never attempt to make turtle fight if you're not level 4. You can start turtle fight if you're near level 4 so that upon reaching level 4 ult can be utilized. This what usually happens after turtle fight, a teamfight was next to take down and you're the front line of the battle
Make this a habit to surprise a gank and also take time in using ult especially to your side lanes, you're a slow hero so make sure that you only help a lane which is having a hard time.

If you're utilizing you're ult, the instincts of the enemies is to bring you to their tower or their teammates and so they will use flicker, dash, or anything that could run away. Take a great timing to drag them to your teammates. Your team should always check you if you're using your ult because it would be a waste if you're using it without taking it down.

Alwaysake sure to take down your enemy heroes that you use your ultimate. This is a very big help in team fight because after 5 seconds, your ultimate will be ready again, that's why you must build items to make you have a sustainable hero

equips.equip_desc: For the equipment, first is the demon boots with dire hit. The reason behind is gloo can spam his first skill, and with that it hreatly consumes its mana thus making him unable to spam its first skill if no mana. Next is the cursed helmet, very useful since it has additional hp and damages especially when ult is being used. Dominance ice for a great combination with the cursed helmet. Oracle for addtional healing which greatly affects you to stay longer in team fights. The next are Athena's shield and Antique Cuirass for the defense of magic and physical effects.

hero.hero_overview: Gloo is very effective in team fights especially if you have a damage dealer teammates. The best thing about gloo is he can sustain damage and can take down enemies. But in this case gloo is a support tank to be the front line of the damage dealers. Whhereas this could waste enemies skills on taking you down instead of your teammates
hero.hero_strength: He is very strong especially to those heroes with lack of mobility. In the early game, he could guard off invading heroes of your team's jungle.
hero.hero_weakness: Worst thing of this hero if this is a roamer, he is slow and could not rotate fast on the jungle and on ganking other lanes. Also he could have a hard time guarding off your teammates especially to those heroes with high mobility

data.recommend: A gloo roam could be used. Pro players usually have him as an exp laner which is also good but what if a gloo roam? You can have another fighter and a tank as well

spell.spell_desc: This spell was used in order to chase down escaping enemies or in some cases surprising a gank. This could also help you escape in times when you are using your ult and you've been brought to enemy towers. Also one technique used is when 2nd skill is on cool down, you can flicker to your 1st skill being deployed

data.title: GLOO Roam

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Heroes like terizla which are slow and that have no dash will have difficulty fighting Gloo as it allows Gloo to combo freely with his first skill eventually weakening their health down

counters.counter_desc: Heroes with dash skill such as harith counters Gloo with the ability to go to the turrets forcing Gloo players to cancel their ults effectively wasting the ult as it won't reset without a kill

emblems.emblem_desc: This emblem set up allow Gloo to have the ability to sustain with Tenacity and impure rage and still keep his chasing ability with agility, the support emblem is my preferred choice for Gloo as it allows for more sustainability by allowing for more healing

equips.equip_desc:
Tough boots for reduced cc duration to avoid dying when getting ganked.
Glowing wand as the first item to counter majority of the fighters your laning against examples being Yu Zhong and Lapu-lapu.
Sky Piercer to end fights early and to increase the chance of winning against your fighter counter part such as Gatotkaca
Cursed Helmet for late game minion clearing and to also buff you when ulting.
Ice Queen Wand for the additional slow and the extra movement speed.
Oracle for more sustainability and more cooldown reduction to spam Gloo's skills.

hero.hero_overview:
Gloo is a tank hero in
Mobile Legends: Bang Bang known for his crowd control, high sustain, and unique ability to split into smaller units and attach to enemies, disrupting fights with his sticky, regenerating playstyle .
hero.hero_strength: Gloo excels as a durable tank with strong crowd control, self-healing, and the unique ability to split into smaller units and latch onto enemies, disrupting team fights.
hero.hero_weakness: Gloo struggles against heroes with high burst damage, crowd control, and anti-heal items (like Sea Halberd), as well as mobile marksmen (e.g., Claude) who can kite him and exploit his reliance on sustained fights .

data.recommend: Feel free to Experiment with the items and especially the spell for comfort

spell.spell_desc: Flameshot allows for more combos during Gloo's Ult preventing enemies from running towards their teammates or turrets

counters.counter_desc: Vexana adalah mimpi buruk untuk user Gloo, walaupun Paramis juga counter Gloo, tpi tidak semengerikan Vexana. Karena skill 2 Gloo sekarang udh gak bisa di batalin, membuat pasif vexana ketika meledak lebih mudah.

Paramis juga bisa mengcounter Gloo, tpi untuk saat ini lebih cocok mengcounter ultimate Gloo, agar Hero tim tidak mokad, sama Gloo. Tpi untuk early game, paramis counter alami bnget, karena Gloo blum punya item deffent yg tebel.

Hanya agar Gloo ny Kualahan(kecapean), dan susah laning/farm aja sih, cici counter semua hero yg hp ny tebel. Sedangkan Gloo, hero ny gampang tebel darah, jdi ny Cici lumayan cocok untuk counter Gloo, walaupun emang msih bisa di bntai Cici nya dgn hero setim dengan Gloo.

dominants.dominant_desc: Jika di Jungle bisa fokus farming. Tpi di Exp Lane, fokus clear minion, klo bisa cut lane. Karena Gloo gampang kabur dan clear lane dengan cepat, pke skill 1 & 2 nya. Tpi, juga hati² sama hero lawan & gank-king.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Agar lebih memudahkan rotasi dan kabur ketika selesai ultimate, ketika di area jungle. Agility untuk memudahkan Gloo nempel ke skill 1 lebih cepat. Impure Rage untuk clear minion/ceep dgn cepat, dan lumayan buat hemat mana & dmg 1% dari hp lawan.

Kalau semisal pakai Brave Smite, ketika skill 1 mengenai hero lawan, regen ny akan lumayan deres, membuat nya sustained di Lane-ning.
farming lebih cepet ae, agility agar skill 1 mudah kena ke monster jungle.

equips.equip_desc: Guardian Helmet adalah item wajib untuk Gloo untuk patch saat ini, karena untuk menutupi ultimate Gloo yg udh gk bisa regen tiap detik. Tpi jika musuh sedikit hero blink, bisa pakai ice queen untuk regen, moment speed, slow. Tpi, jika banyak hero blink gk ad 1 pun yg jalan kaki, bisa ganti item apapun ke Glowing Wand, karena sekaligus untuk damage karena susah di tangkap. Dan jika, tipe yg bar² solo, Cursed Helmet bisa di ganti antara Ice Queen, twilight armor, atau brust frost.

Guardian Helmet & Ice Queen Wand adalah item wajib untuk Gloo untuk patch saat ini, karena untuk menutupi ultimate Gloo yg udh gk bisa regen tiap detik. Tpi jika musuh banyak hero blink gk ad 1 pun yg jalan kaki, bisa ganti ke Glowing Wand. Dan jika, tipe yg bar² solo, Dominance Ice bisa di ganti Glowing Wand.

data.recommend: Cara Aku bermain Gloo 1K Pertandingan, WR 64%

spell.spell_desc: Skill 1 + Fliker untuk last, full-in stk. bisa juga untuk kabur ketika selesai ulti, ntah itu abis kill atau turun paksa, bisa langsung Fliker karena dpt moment speed tambahan ketika turun dari ultimate, jdi ibarat sprint + fliker.

data.title: Gloo Top 1 Lampung (B.Indo)
